name: action1-mcp
description: MCP server for Action1 — endpoint inventory, patch visibility, and policy automation via the Model Context Protocol
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured read access to Action1 RMM data: organizations, endpoints, missing OS/application updates, and policies. Multi-region (NorthAmerica / Europe / AsiaPacific / Australia). Multi-org via MSP credentials. Read-only in v1 — deploy/automation surface is intentionally separate for blast-radius reasons.

action1_api_key.title: Action1 API Key (Client ID)
action1_api_key.description: Generate at app.action1.com → Settings → API Credentials

action1_secret.title: Action1 Secret
action1_secret.description: Paired secret for the API key above (non-recoverable — copy on creation)

action1_default_org_id.title: Default Organization ID
action1_default_org_id.description: Optional. If set, tools that take an organization_id will use this when none is provided.
